hero.headline: When your power's out, we're *already on the way*
hero.subheadline: Same-day service, honest pricing, and electrical work that passes inspection the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every Wire, Panel, and Outlet
services_section.subheading: From blown breakers to full kitchen rewires

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Repairs
services.description: Breakers tripping? Panel buzzing? We diagnose fast and fix it right.

services.title: Kitchen & Lighting Install
services.description: New construction or remodel lighting. Recessed, pendant, under-cabinet — all of it.

services.title: Outlet & Switch Work
services.description: Add outlets where you need them. Move switches that make no sense.

services.title: Emergency Electrical
services.description: Power outages, sparking outlets, burning smells — we handle the urgent stuff.

about.heading: Chattanooga Electric Work Done Right
about.body: We're the local crew that shows up when we say we will. Real electricians, real trucks, real solutions.

reviews.name: Billy H.
reviews.text: Big kitchen remodel job — walls demolished, fifty new lights installed, receptacles moved. 3E knocked it out of the park and stayed communicative throughout.

reviews.name: Sean R.
reviews.text: Breaker panel issues fixed same day. Professional, courteous, and the boss didn't even make me pay right away. Very impressed.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Chattanooga Area Coverage
service_areas.subheading: Local electric service you can count on

cta.heading: Power Problems? We'll Handle It
cta.body: Free estimates on all electrical work. Licensed, insured, and ready to get your lights back on.
